home.tagline: Never be surprised by a collection agency again. PayWatch scans your email, tracks your bills, and alerts you before it's too late.

auth.checkEmail: Check your email for a confirmation link.
auth.resetEmailSent: A password reset email has been sent.
auth.errorAlreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Try signing in.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Let's set up your account. This takes less than a minute.
onboarding.languageSubtitle: You can always change this later in settings.
onboarding.scanTitle: How do you receive your bills?
onboarding.scanSubtitle: We'll use this to show you the right scan options.
onboarding.scanGmailDesc: We'll automatically scan your Gmail inbox for invoices
onboarding.scanCameraDesc: Take photos of paper bills with your camera
onboarding.scanBothDesc: Scan emails and take photos of paper bills
onboarding.readySubtitle: Your PayWatch account is ready. Connect Gmail or scan your first bill next.
onboarding.readyGmailHint: After starting, you can connect Gmail in settings to automatically find invoices.
onboarding.readyCameraHint: After starting, you can take a photo of your first bill right away.

dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.noBillsDescription: Scan your first bill via camera or connect Gmail to automatically find invoices.
dashboard.savedZero: Pay on time to save on collection costs

bills.noBillsHint: Add your first bill using the button above.

addBill.title: Add bill
addBill.errorGeneral: Something went wrong. Please try again.

billDetail.markAsPaidDesc: Set the payment date to today
billDetail.favoriteDesc: Favorite bills appear at the top of the list
billDetail.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this bill?

gmail.title: Gmail Accounts
gmail.description: Connect your Gmail account to automatically find invoices in your inbox. PayWatch only reads emails — we can never modify or delete anything.
gmail.denied: You denied access. Please try again.
gmail.errorGeneral: Something went wrong. Please try again.
gmail.disconnectConfirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect this Gmail account? Existing bills will not be deleted.
gmail.noAccountsHint: Connect your Gmail to automatically find invoices in your inbox.

pwa.installDesc: Add PayWatch to your home screen for quick access.
pwa.installIOS: Tap 'Share' then 'Add to Home Screen' to install PayWatch.

stats.title: Statistics
stats.noDataHint: Once you have bills, your performance and trends will appear here.
stats.healthDescription: Score based on payment behavior, overdue bills and escalations.
stats.streakConsecutive: paid on time in a row
stats.aiDescription: Let AI analyze your bills for priorities, warnings and patterns.

cashflow.title: Cashflow
cashflow.noDataHint: Add bills to see your cashflow overview with predictions.
cashflow.noUpcoming: No outstanding bills in this period.

settings.title: Settings
settings.profileDesc: Name, language, PIN and dark mode
settings.gmailAccountsDesc: Connect or disconnect Gmail for scanning
settings.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account and all data
settings.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This cannot be undone. All your bills, scans and data will be permanently deleted.

scan.partialSummary: {processed} emails scanned before error, {bills} bills found.
scan.errorNetwork: Network error. Check your internet connection.

cameraScan.title: Scan bill
cameraScan.captureDescription: Take a clear photo of your bill, invoice or letter. AI will automatically recognize the details.
cameraScan.extractingHint: AI is analyzing your photo. This takes a few seconds.
cameraScan.confirmDescription: AI recognized these details. Review and adjust where needed.
cameraScan.errorGeneral: We could not recognize the details. Try a clearer photo.
cameraScan.errorRequired: Please fill in vendor, amount and due date.

draftLetter.title: Draft Letter
draftLetter.intentQuestion: What do you want to achieve?
draftLetter.intentPaymentPlanDesc: Ask to pay the amount in installments
draftLetter.intentPostponeDesc: Ask for more time to pay
draftLetter.intentConfirmPaidDesc: Confirm that you have already paid
draftLetter.detailsQuestion_betalingsregeling: How many installments do you want?
draftLetter.detailsQuestion_uitstel: How many days of postponement do you need?
draftLetter.detailsQuestion_bezwaar: What is the reason for your dispute?
draftLetter.subject: Subject
draftLetter.disclaimer: Note: this is an AI-generated draft. Review the content before sending. This is not legal advice.
draftLetter.errorGeneral: Something went wrong. Please try again.

incasso.wikDescription: Under the Dutch Wet Incassokosten, a collection agency may charge up to the amount below on top of the original bill.
incasso.wikExtra: extra on top of original amount
incasso.wikDisclaimer: Note: this is an estimate based on the WIK scale. Actual costs may vary.
incasso.savingsDescription: Pay this bill on time and avoid up to {amount} in extra collection costs.
incasso.legalDisclaimer: Note: PayWatch provides general information about the collection process. This is not legal advice.
incasso.overdueWarning: This bill is overdue. Pay as soon as possible to avoid extra costs.

eerste_betaling.name: First Step
eerste_betaling.howTo: Mark your first bill as paid.

nul_achterstallig.name: Clean Slate
nul_achterstallig.howTo: Make sure you have no overdue bills.

scanner.name: Scanner
scanner.howTo: Scan a bill with your camera.

brief_geschreven.name: Spokesperson
brief_geschreven.howTo: Write a draft letter for a bill.

mood_gelogd.name: In Touch
mood_gelogd.howTo: Log your mood on the dashboard.

mood.title: How are you feeling today?
mood.logged: Thanks! Your mood has been logged.

profile.title: Profile
profile.emailHint: Email cannot be changed in the app.

lawyer.description: At this stage it is wise to seek legal advice. Below are law firms near you.
lawyer.noGemeente: Set your municipality in Settings to see lawyers near you.
lawyer.noResults: No law firms found. Call the Legal Desk: 0900-8020.
lawyer.nibudDesc: nibud.nl — for financial advice and debt help

helpResources.title: Help Resources
helpResources.desc: Free help with financial problems and debts.
helpResources.geldfit_desc: Check if your finances are in order

notifications.title: Email & notifications
notifications.digest_desc: Receive a weekly summary by email
notifications.features_desc: Emails about new features and tips
